languages.text: "Не берите в голову. Просто встреча с вашим потомком вышла не из приятных".

traits.locale_text: "Не берите в голову. Просто встреча с вашим потомком вышла не из приятных".

languages.text: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."
languages.original_text: "Не берите в голову. Просто встреча с вашим потомком вышла не из приятных".

traits.locale_text: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."
"It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."
"It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."

languages.text: “没什么。只不过我跟你那位后代打交道时，闹得不太愉快。”
languages.original_text: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."

traits.locale_text: “没什么。只不过我跟你那位后代打交道时，闹得不太愉快。”

languages.text: « C'est sans importance. Sachez simplement que ma rencontre avec votre descendant fut particulièrement déplaisante. »
languages.original_text: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."

traits.locale_text: « C'est sans importance. Sachez simplement que ma rencontre avec votre descendant fut particulièrement déplaisante. »

languages.text: "Önemi yok. Soydaşınla pek hoş bir karşılaşma yaşamadık da."
languages.original_text: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."

traits.locale_text: "Önemi yok. Soydaşınla pek hoş bir karşılaşma yaşamadık da."

languages.text: «No importa. Es solo que mi encuentro con su descendiente no fue muy agradable».
languages.original_text: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."

traits.locale_text: «No importa. Es solo que mi encuentro con su descendiente no fue muy agradable».

languages.text: "Das spielt keine Rolle. Allerdings war meine Begegnung mit Eurem Nachkommen nicht angenehm."
languages.original_text: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."

traits.locale_text: "Das spielt keine Rolle. Allerdings war meine Begegnung mit Eurem Nachkommen nicht angenehm."

languages.text: 「それはどうでもいい。ただ、あなたの子孫との出会いは、私にとって心地よいものではなかっただけだ。」
languages.original_text: "It does not matter. It's just that my encounter with your descendant was not a pleasant one."

traits.locale_text: 「それはどうでもいい。ただ、あなたの子孫との出会いは、私にとって心地よいものではなかっただけだ。」
